So what are the advantages of uniportal robotics?
Well, for a uniportal VATS surgeon, you've got the 3D vision, you've got the ability to suture, and you've got wristed instrumentation.
So it really is a big advantage over uniportal VATS.
What about the multiportal robotic surgeon?
Well, the big advantage is speed.
It is just so quick to set up.
One incision in the chest, three arms straight in, no CO2, and off you go.
It really is tremendously fast.
People will ask, is it less painful?
Well, that remains to be seen.
But I think the big advantage of going from multiportal to uniportal robotics is A, it's fast, and B, finally, we have unification.
